message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontStyle bold skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor black skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0 skinparam classHeaderFontColor black skinparam classHeaderBorderThickness 1 skinparam classHeaderAlignment left skinparam classAttributeFontStyle normal skinparam classAttributeFontColor black skinparam classMethodFontStyle normal skinparam classMethodFontColor black skinparam classMethodAlignment left skinparam classAttributeAlignment left skinparam classMethodAlignment left skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontStyle bold skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor black skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0 skinparam classHeaderFontColor black skinparam classHeaderBorderThickness 1 skinparam classHeaderAlignment left skinparam classAttributeFontStyle normal skinparam classAttributeFontColor black skinparam classMethodFontStyle normal skinparam classMethodFontColor black skinparam classMethodAlignment left skinparam classAttributeAlignment left skinparam classMethodAlignment left class "Handler" as Handler { + next + handle() } class "ConcreteHandler1" as ConcreteHandler1 { + handle() } class "ConcreteHandler2" as ConcreteHandler2 { + handle() } class "ConcreteHandler3" as ConcreteHandler3 { + handle() } Handler o-- "*" Handler : next ConcreteHandler1 --|> Handler ConcreteHandler2 --|> Handler ConcreteHandler3 --|> Handler note top of Handler A Handler end note note top of ConcreteHandler1 C ConcreteHandler1 end note note top of ConcreteHandler2 C ConcreteHandler2 end note note top of ConcreteHandler3 C ConcreteHandler3 end note actor client client -> Handler : handle() @enduml
